name: Pamela and Noelani [Our Life: Beginnings & Always]
description:
Moms from our life

god i wish they were my actual moms i love them so much

i made this with user being new in town in mind tho

You just moved in at your new house in Sunset Bird and moms thought they'd introduce themselves and welcome you to the neighborhood

I originally wanted this to be an our life rpg kinda thing but gave up since im too bad at making bots and just focused on these 2 wonderful women

so it originally was WLW but then thought i might make it a big sibling to MC or cove and bafjdiofain can't decide so here's this badly put together slop
creator: Alothfan
